name: Fisherman's Bouillabaisse
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz (1 can) Tomatoes, whole peeled and undrained
1 1/2 pounds Lobster Tails, cut into 3-inch pieces
1 pound Fish fillets (Red Snapper, cod, halibut, or similar)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté until fragrant.
3. Pour in the water and white wine, stirring to combine.
4. Stir in the vegetable soup mix according to package instructions.
5. Add chopped parsley and thyme leaves.
6. Gently add the diced tomatoes, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
7. Add the lobster tails, breaking them into smaller pieces if needed.
8. Finally, add the fish fillets and cook until heated through.
9. Stir in the clams and mussels, well scrubbed, and simmer for a few more minutes.
10. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
11. Turn off the heat when serving.
